scripts.install-all: echo 'Deprecated: use npm install instead' && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules && cd cloudflare && rm -rf node_modules .wrangler
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:js -- --fix && npm run lint:css -- --fix
scripts.test:integration: vitest run --project integration-tests --reporter=default --reporter=html --outputFile.html=./tests/integration/report/index.html && node tests/serve-report.js tests/integration/report
scripts.test:integration:prod: TEST_ENV=production vitest run --project integration-tests --reporter=default --reporter=html --outputFile.html=./tests/integration/report/index.html && node tests/serve-report.js tests/integration/report
scripts.test:integration:preview: TEST_ENV=preview vitest run --project integration-tests --reporter=default --reporter=html --outputFile.html=./tests/integration/report/index.html && node tests/serve-report.js tests/integration/report
scripts.test:integration:branch: TEST_ENV=branch:$BRANCH vitest run --project integration-tests --reporter=default --reporter=html --outputFile.html=./tests/integration/report/index.html && node tests/serve-report.js tests/integration/report
scripts.test:integration:local: TEST_ENV=local vitest run --project integration-tests --reporter=default --reporter=html --outputFile.html=./tests/integration/report/index.html && node tests/serve-report.js tests/integration/report
scripts.test:authz: vitest run --project authz-tests --reporter=default --reporter=html --outputFile.html=./tests/authz/report/index.html && node tests/serve-report.js tests/authz/report
